description_long: This is a tall, green glass bottle with a yellow screw cap and several paper labels affixed to its body and neck. The main label on the front is yellow with black Japanese characters, and there is a prominent neck tag with additional text and decorative elements. The bottle has a classic sake or wine bottle shape, with a narrow neck and wider base, and appears to be filled with liquid. The rear label contains detailed information in Japanese, likely including product details and ingredients. The bottle's surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light, and there are no visible signs of damage or wear.
description: A tall green glass bottle with a yellow screw cap, Japanese labels, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main yellow label with Japanese characters and a neck tag.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the side label and the neck tag's edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a large white label with detailed Japanese text.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the neck tag's front, with bold black and gold text and decorative elements.
attribute_label_or_branding: Multiple Japanese labels: a large yellow label with black characters on the front, a white label with detailed text on the back, and a decorative yellow neck tag with black and gold text. All labels are rectangular and affixed to the bottle's body and neck.
